title: Talk 2 Me
lyrics:
[Kohjiya「Talk 2 Me」歌詞]

[Intro]
Talk to me
Why don't you talk to me?
Like you used to, you don't talk to me
Why don't you talk to me?
Like you used to, you don't

Talk to me
Why don't you talk to me?
Like you used to, you don't talk to me
Why don't you talk to me?
Like you used to, you don't

[Verse 1]
辛いことが辛いままじゃ
ムカつくよだから
金に換える過去の話
辛いことが辛いままじゃ
Destroy myself
素直に書いてるだけ
仕事 遊びの 2 way
友達待ってる 3 base
ヒット飛ばしてく ball game
んでサヨナラするルンペン
スタジオにカモ 俺ら
踊ってる like Ja morant
かませば立つ角が
掴んで登るカルマ
先生が知らない sturdy
ダチが踊ってる jersey
I know お前らツボってるサビ
東京で訛ってる語尾
出身 南からきて get money
ダチが踊ってる jersey
Grrr, Grrr

[Chorus]
要らないプロモ
Tell me baby, you afraid?
全ては no magic
んでゲトる円
俺要らないプロモ
Tell me baby, you afraid?
要らないプロモ
Tell me baby, you afraid?
全ては no magic
んでゲトる円
俺要らないプロモ
Tell me baby, you afraid?

[Post-Chorus]
Talk to me
Why don't you talk to me?
Like you used to, you don't talk to me
Why don't you talk to me?
Like you usеd to, you don't

[Outro]
Talk to me
Why don't you talk to me?
Like you usеd to, you don't talk to me
Why don't you talk to me?
Like you used to, you don't
